name: Cranberry-Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F.
In a large bowl, combine the flours, corn meal, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
In a separate bowl or measuring cup, whisk together buttermilk, orange juice, oil, egg, and orange rind.
Add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring until just moistened.
Stir in the cranberries.
Divide the batter among 12 greased muffin cups.
Place the muffin tin in the hot oven and bake for 20-25 minutes.
